title: The High Alchemist
description: Alch an item worth over 100M. Turning gold into slightly less gold, at scale.

title: The Forbidden Word
description: Convince Harry to say "Pregnant" in clan chat. No context provided.

title: Touched by the Gods
description: Pull a 3rd age piece from a clue scroll. Statistically shouldn't happen. Yet here we are.

title: Betrayal in the Raid
description: PK a TEA member mid-raid and flame them in clan chat. Friendship is temporary, loot is eternal.

title: The Infernal Teapot
description: Complete the Inferno using only Tea as your food source. Hydration over health.

title: The Nerder
description: First clan member to reach 200M XP in any skill. Nerd.

title: Dragon of TEA
description: First to reach Dragon Cup rank. Go take a shower.

title: The Prophet
description: Call your drop in clan chat before actually receiving it, then get it. Proof required.

title: First Blood
description: Obtain a rare unique on your very first kill count at a boss. Beginner's luck is an understatement.

title: The Century
description: Count to 100 in clan chat without anyone messing it up. A true test of clan discipline.

title: Sandwich Lady Enjoyer
description: Obtain the full Sandwich Lady outfit. Sexy.
